baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare against a no-skill baseline or the previous skill version; pass only when the skilled run better satisfies the assertions without losing required safety or precision.

evals.prompt: Review this Next.js page for avoidable waterfalls and bundle bloat.
evals.expected_output: A prioritized performance review or patch addressing data waterfalls, import costs, rendering, and validation.
assertions: Checks for serial awaits that can be parallelized.
Identifies barrel imports or heavy client bundles where present.
Runs relevant tests, typecheck, or build when editing.
